goal: Mature the application from an insight tool into a decision assistant. Score remains a light visual cue. Primary value is helping teams tighten solutions and proposals through structured review cycles, guided clarification, visible iteration, decision tracking, and convergence toward proposal readiness.

product_intent: Move from one-shot reviews to guided tightening loops
Help users understand what is unresolved and what decision is needed next
Reduce free-text effort and improve review quality with targeted SME-style guidance
Support pre-sales first, then extend to SDLC and operations
Prepare the foundation for future self-learning through prompt and outcome logging

work_style: Do not redesign architecture unless explicitly requested
Keep UI simple for non-technical users
Stop after each sprint and validate
success_criteria: Users can improve review quality across iterations
The system can explain what changed and why
Proposal generation uses the strongest review, not just the latest review
The system identifies unresolved decisions, not only missing categories
Foundations exist for future prompt learning and self-improvement

sprints.name: Foundation and Review Chain Stability
sprints.goal: Make reviews version-scoped, explicitly chained, and visible as iterations.

stories.title: Version-scoped review list
stories.description: Ensure reviews are displayed and managed only within the selected version context.
acceptance_criteria: Selecting a version shows only reviews belonging to that version
No cross-version reviews appear in the Reviews workspace
Review counts reflect version-scoped data

stories.title: Explicit review chaining
stories.description: Add previous_review_id so review iterations are traceable and not inferred only by time.
acceptance_criteria: Each new review can optionally reference previous_review_id
Review lineage can be reconstructed reliably
Existing reviews remain backward-compatible

stories.title: Iteration visibility
stories.description: Show review iteration number and progression clearly in the UI.
acceptance_criteria: Each review displays iteration label such as R1, R2, R3
Review detail shows previous review reference when present
Users can understand sequence without opening every item

stories.title: Move Ask SME before next review
stories.description: Remove deep dive from the end of review execution and reposition it as a tightening step before the next review.
acceptance_criteria: Ask SME is no longer triggered only after review completion
Users can trigger Ask SME before starting the next review iteration
Current review output is not silently modified by Ask SME

stories.title: Demote completeness score
stories.description: Reduce visual emphasis of quality score so it does not train the wrong user behaviour.
acceptance_criteria: Score appears as a small badge or secondary UI element
Score is not the dominant visual element in the review workspace
No major logic changes required for this sprint

sprints.name: Prompt Builder Foundation
sprints.goal: Replace blank custom prompting with structured prompt assembly.

stories.title: Prompt builder sections
stories.description: Introduce a structured prompt builder using baseline persona prompt, suggested questions, and user additions.
acceptance_criteria: Prompt builder shows baseline persona prompt
Prompt builder supports injected suggested questions
Prompt builder supports user-added custom notes
Final assembled prompt is visible before running review

stories.title: Persist prompt builder state
stories.description: Save prompt builder selections and custom notes per review iteration.
acceptance_criteria: Review stores prompt_builder_state
Users can reopen and inspect the prompt used
Prompt builder state is available for the next iteration

stories.title: Baseline vs customised indicator
stories.description: Show whether a review used the baseline prompt only or a customised tightened prompt.
acceptance_criteria: UI indicates baseline review vs customised review
Indicator is visible in review list and review details

sprints.name: Guided Tightening Loop
sprints.goal: Turn Ask SME into a structured mechanism for tightening the next review.

stories.title: SME question generator
stories.description: Generate clarification questions instead of generic recommendations.
acceptance_criteria: Ask SME returns targeted clarification questions
Questions are tied to weaknesses, gaps, or unresolved areas
Questions are concise and review-improving, not generic advice

stories.title: Question selection flow
stories.description: Allow users to choose which suggested questions should tighten the next review.
acceptance_criteria: Users can select or deselect suggested questions
Selected questions are inserted into prompt builder
Unselected questions do not affect the next review

stories.title: Run tightened review
stories.description: Create the next review using the improved prompt assembled from baseline plus selected questions.
acceptance_criteria: Review uses prompt builder content
Prompt changes are traceable
Next review reflects the tightening inputs

stories.title: What changed summary
stories.description: Show a concise comparison between current review and previous review.
acceptance_criteria: Review details include new, resolved, and unchanged findings
Users can quickly see how the review evolved
Comparison is tied to previous_review_id

sprints.name: Weakness and Gap Intelligence
sprints.goal: Identify where the current review is weak, unclear, or incomplete.

stories.title: Weakness extraction
stories.description: Extract unclear areas, weak assumptions, low-confidence areas, and missing clarity from reviews.
acceptance_criteria: System generates a structured weaknesses section
Weaknesses are visible in review details
Weaknesses can be used by Ask SME

stories.title: Missing category visibility
stories.description: Make missing content areas explicit and visible to the user.
acceptance_criteria: UI shows missing categories clearly
Missing categories can be used to drive suggested questions
Users can distinguish missing content from low-confidence content

stories.title: Gap-aware SME
stories.description: Use previous review findings and weaknesses to generate better tightening questions.
acceptance_criteria: Ask SME considers previous review findings
Ask SME considers weaknesses and missing categories
Question quality is more targeted than baseline

sprints.name: Decision Intelligence
sprints.goal: Move from finding issues to identifying decisions that must be made next.

stories.title: Decision point extraction
stories.description: Extract explicit decision points such as platform choice, DR inclusion, phasing approach, or cost trade-offs.
acceptance_criteria: System generates a structured decision_points section
Decision points are visible in review details
Decision points can be linked to review findings

stories.title: Decision-question mapping
stories.description: Map suggested SME questions to decision points.
acceptance_criteria: Each suggested question can reference a decision point
Users can understand why a question matters
Prompt builder retains decision relevance

stories.title: Decision status tracking
stories.description: Track decisions as open, addressed, validated, or rejected across iterations.
acceptance_criteria: Decision status exists and can be updated by iteration logic
Decision status is visible in review details
Decision status can be compared across iterations

sprints.name: Resolution and Iteration Intelligence
sprints.goal: Track whether weaknesses and decisions are actually being resolved review by review.

stories.title: Weakness resolution tracking
stories.description: Track whether identified weaknesses have been addressed across iterations.
acceptance_criteria: Each weakness can be marked open, addressed, validated, or rejected
Resolution status is visible in the latest review
Latest review shows whether prior weaknesses remain unresolved

stories.title: Iteration diff engine
stories.description: Compare review N and review N-1 in a structured way.
acceptance_criteria: System shows resolved, new, and unchanged items
Diff includes decisions and weaknesses, not only risks
Users can understand why review quality improved or stagnated

stories.title: Feedback integration into tightening loop
stories.description: Feed unresolved client feedback into the next review tightening cycle.
acceptance_criteria: Only unresolved relevant feedback is injected
Feedback is visible in the next review context
Old resolved feedback does not pollute new review iterations

sprints.name: Convergence and Learning Foundation
sprints.goal: Measure proposal readiness and prepare the ground for future self-learning from prompts and outcomes.

stories.title: Convergence indicator
stories.description: Show how close the current review chain is to decision readiness.
acceptance_criteria: System computes convergence based on resolved decisions and weaknesses
Convergence is visible as a secondary readiness indicator
Convergence is more important than completeness score

stories.title: Proposal readiness gate
stories.description: Only allow proposal generation when the review chain is sufficiently tightened.
acceptance_criteria: Proposal generation checks active review and convergence readiness
Critical unresolved decision points block proposal promotion when configured
Validation message explains what still needs attention

stories.title: Prompt logging foundation
stories.description: Capture prompt inputs and outcomes so the system can learn later.
acceptance_criteria: System stores baseline prompt, selected questions, user additions, and final prompt
System stores outcome links such as review result and proposal linkage
Prompt logging is retrievable for future analytics

stories.title: Learning-ready retrieval
stories.description: Prepare a simple retrieval pattern for future self-learning without implementing autonomous learning yet.
acceptance_criteria: Past successful prompts can be queried or listed
Prompt history can be filtered by persona, scenario, or project context
No autonomous retraining or optimisation is required in this sprint

resolutions.ambiguity: Definition of strongest review for proposal generation (S7-02, success criteria)
resolutions.decision: The strongest review is the Active Review explicitly selected by the user. The system does not choose automatically.
rules: User is responsible for selecting the Active Review
System supports the decision but does not replace it
No automatic ranking or selection logic required
resolutions.future_enhancement: A recommendation hint can be added later, but is out of scope until explicitly requested.

resolutions.ambiguity: Client feedback data model and linkage for S6-03
resolutions.decision: Feedback is treated as additional artifacts: documents, transcripts, or notes. No complex schema required.
rules: Feedback belongs to proposal_version_id if it exists, otherwise to version_id
Only recent and relevant feedback is injected into the next tightening cycle
No deep classification or tagging required in this sprint
resolutions.future_enhancement: Structured feedback classification can be layered in a later sprint if needed.

resolutions.ambiguity: Convergence formula and thresholds for S7-01 and S7-02
resolutions.decision: Convergence is not calculated numerically. The system shows a Decision Readiness indicator with three levels: Low, Medium, High.
rules: Low: one or more unresolved decision points present
Medium: unresolved weaknesses present but no unresolved decision points
High: no unresolved decision points and no unresolved weaknesses
No weighting, scoring formula, or numeric thresholds required
Decision Readiness does not block any user action; it is informational only
resolutions.future_enhancement: Weighting or threshold configuration can be introduced later if teams need tighter gates.

resolutions.ambiguity: Persona and scenario as filter dimensions for prompt retrieval (S7-04)
resolutions.decision: Persona and scenario are stored as lightweight metadata fields on the review and prompt_builder_state. No new tables or schema changes required.
rules: Fields are optional and attached to the existing review and prompt_builder_state structures
Retrieval filters on these fields in S7-04 use simple equality matching
resolutions.future_enhancement: A controlled vocabulary or enum list for persona_name and scenario_type can be added later.

resolutions.ambiguity: Scope of score demotion in S1-05 and risk of touching scoring logic
resolutions.decision: S1-05 is confirmed as a UI-only change. Scoring logic is not modified.
rules: Score is moved to a small badge or secondary UI position
Score does not block any user action including marking Draft or Final
Scoring logic, storage, and computation remain unchanged
Score remains available as a visual reference for user decision support
resolutions.future_enhancement: Capturing user reasoning when ignoring the score can be added later as a learning input.
